name: agentic_radar
notes: SplxAI Agentic Radar — SAST for agentic AI workflows (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, Claude Agent SDK, OpenAI Assistants). Surfaces over-broad tool grants, agent-to-agent privilege escalation, PHI flow into prompts, prompt-injection-prone i

name: eval_suite
notes: Pre-prod gate: hallucination / bias / jailbreak rate must pass thresholds before deploy. Plug TruthfulQA / MedQA / custom QA harness.

name: garak
notes: NVIDIA garak — LLM vulnerability scanner. Probes for prompt injection, encoding bypass, leakage, jailbreaks, toxicity.

name: promptfoo
notes: promptfoo / DeepEval — curated AI eval suites (correctness, safety, refusal). Complement to PyRIT.

name: pyrit
notes: Microsoft PyRIT — multi-turn AI red team orchestration. Strategies: injection, encoding, multiturn, crescendo, leakage.

name: atomic
notes: Red Canary Atomic Red Team — MITRE ATT&CK technique emulation against the agent runtime host. Validates EDR detection coverage.

name: burp
notes: PortSwigger Burp Suite via REST API (Pro / Enterprise). Passive or active scan against the surrounding web app.

name: caldera
notes: MITRE Caldera — autonomous adversary emulation. Chained ATT&CK abilities (an adversary profile) run end-to-end via Caldera's REST API; complements Atomic (per-technique) with campaign-shaped coverage. Mutation-required.

name: dockle
notes: dockle — container image hygiene scanner (different focus than Trivy: image best practices).

name: metasploit
notes: Metasploit Framework via RPC. Auxiliary scanners by default; exploit modules require Tier 1 + explicit allow-list.

name: nuclei
notes: Template-driven web vulnerability scanner. Runs the exposures/misconfiguration/vulnerabilities templates by default.

name: recon
notes: ProjectDiscovery chain (subfinder → httpx → naabu → katana). Subdomain enumeration, HTTP probing, port scan, URL crawl. Drives shadow-AI discovery.

name: ride
notes: Adobe Ride — REST/JSON API test suite runner (configurable hook). Runs an in-house Maven Ride suite that targets the AI gateway / MCP / agent runtime API surface; converts test failures to Findings. Mutation-required.

name: sqlmap
notes: sqlmap — SQL injection confirmation + characterization. Confirms what Nuclei/ZAP detect.

name: zap
notes: OWASP ZAP — free DAST scanner via REST API. Modes: spider (URL discovery), baseline (1-min spider + passive — Tier 3/4), active (spider + active scan), full (spider + active + extended passive), api (OpenAPI/SOAP/GraphQL spec-driven — stron

name: guardrails
notes: NeMo Guardrails — verify guardrails config + smoke a high-severity prompt-injection/PHI prompt through the guarded endpoint.

name: manifest_validator
notes: Validates the manifest at intake — schema + sanctioned-infrastructure policy (PHI without BAA fails immediately, direct API access blocked).

name: mcp_scope
notes: MCP scope validator — tier inheritance, action allow-list, side-effect classification, and live token-scope probe. Highest-leverage single control in the v2.1 plan.

name: threat_model_check
notes: At design stage, verifies a signed-off threat model artifact exists for Tier 1/2 apps (assets, actors, trust boundaries, threats, mitigations, approver).

name: anomaly_detector
notes: Lightweight anomaly detection over telemetry (alias of telemetry_drift with different defaults).

name: telemetry_drift
notes: Production-stage drift over unified AI telemetry (prompts, completions, tool calls, retrievals, agent decisions, policy events).

name: bandit
notes: Python-native SAST — exec/eval, weak crypto, hardcoded credentials, unsafe subprocess, weak SSL/TLS, deserialization risks.

name: bearer
notes: Bearer — privacy-flow SAST. Tracks how PHI/PII flows through code paths; healthcare-fit.

name: checkov
notes: IaC specialist — Terraform / Kubernetes / Helm / CloudFormation / Dockerfile against a 1000+ rule catalog.

name: codeql
notes: GitHub CodeQL — semantic SAST with full taint / data-flow analysis. Different class than Semgrep.

name: dependency_check
notes: OWASP Dependency-Check — multi-language CVE scanner against NIST NVD (Maven / NPM / Gradle / .NET / Ruby / PHP / Python). Broader language coverage than pip_audit. Requires NVD_API_KEY env var on v9+ (NIST throttles unauthenticated pulls).

name: detect_secrets
notes: Yelp detect-secrets — entropy + pattern secret scanning. Third opinion alongside TruffleHog and Gitleaks.

name: gitleaks
notes: Pattern-based secret scanner with a different ruleset than TruffleHog — running both catches more than either alone.

name: gosec
notes: gosec — Go-native SAST (G101 hardcoded creds, G201/G202 SQL formatting, G304 path traversal, G4xx weak crypto, G5xx weak hashes). Graceful degrade when no Go files in source.

name: grype
notes: Anchore Grype — SBOM-aware vulnerability scanner. Pairs with Syft; complements Trivy + pip-audit + OSV-Scanner.

name: hadolint
notes: hadolint — Dockerfile linter (build-time best practices, CIS-aligned rules).

name: modelscan
notes: Protect AI ModelScan — malicious model file detection (pickle, h5, pt, safetensors, onnx). v2.1 names this at build.

name: njsscan
notes: njsscan — Node.js-specific SAST (Express, prototype pollution, JWT misconfig, eval).

name: osv_scanner
notes: Google OSV-Scanner — multi-language vuln scanner against the OSV.dev database. Broader language coverage than pip-audit.

name: owasp_noir
notes: OWASP Noir — attack surface enumeration via static analysis. Static counterpart to the runtime recon chain; produces an authoritative endpoint list for downstream DAST adapters.

name: pip_audit
notes: Python dependency CVE scanner — PyPA Advisory DB + OSV. Catches known-vulnerable transitive deps.

name: presidio
notes: Microsoft Presidio — PHI/PII detection in text and source files. v2.1 names this as the default scrubber.

name: semgrep
notes: Multi-language SAST. Default ruleset: p/python + p/security-audit + p/secrets registries.

name: syft
notes: Anchore Syft — SBOM generator (CycloneDX / SPDX). Compliance evidence for HITRUST.

name: trivy
notes: Filesystem / container image / IaC / secret scanner in one binary. Multi-mode: filesystem, image, config (IaC), k8s.

name: trufflehog
notes: Live-verifying secret scanner across 700+ detectors. CRITICAL on verified hits; HIGH on unverified pattern matches.

name: deepeval
notes: fallback for promptfoo adapter

name: Chintan Gurjar — Essential Red Team GitHub Repos List (~168 repos)
notes: Reviewed for SAST/DAST. Net add: theHarvester. List is overwhelmingly red-team tradecraft / cheatsheets, not SAST/DAST. Original (gated): https://www.scribd.com/document/608127056/1668123815769

name: Lalatenduswain/Dynamic-Application-Security-Testing-DAST-Tools
notes: Already-wired: Nuclei, ZAP. Added: Nikto, OpenVAS/Greenbone, Wapiti, Adobe Ride, OWASP purpleteam, Deepfence ThreatMapper. Skipped (abandoned): Arachni, GoLismero, Grabber, Grendel-Scan, Vega.

name: OWASP — Source Code Analysis Tools community page
notes: Already-wired: Bandit, Bearer, Grype, Semgrep, Syft. Wired this round: gosec, OWASP Noir, SplxAI Agentic Radar, Adobe Ride. Skipped (dead/commercial): FindBugs, PREFast, VisualCodeGrepper, Google CodeSearchDiggity, PVS-Studio, ParaSoft, Spectral, HCL CodeSweep, Puma Scan, .NET Code Analysis, GitHub Advanced Security.

name: promptfoo — Top 5 open-source AI red-teaming tools (2025)
notes: Already-wired matches: Promptfoo, PyRIT, Garak. New: FuzzyAI, promptmap2 (added to defer/niche). Honorable: Viper, Woodpecker.

name: johal.in — CI/CD Pipeline Security: Integrating SAST and DAST Tools in GitHub Actions Workflows (2025)
notes: Site blocks bot fetch (403). Content from search snippets. Tools mentioned: ZAP, CodeQL (wired), Fortify, Veracode, Checkmarx, WebInspect, Acunetix, Snyk (commercial-only). Net adapter additions: zero. Prompted GHA workflow at .github/workflows/ai-protect.yml.

name: primeop/Secure-SDLC-DevSecOps-Pipeline
notes: Tools (Semgrep, SonarQube, ZAP, Burp, Trivy, Syft) all already wired/catalogued. Pattern: per-tool Docker images via GHA. 26 commits, 0 stars, no license. Prompted Containerization plan deferred section.

name: alekzandren/Automated_Vulnerability_Scanner (PySec-Hybrid)
notes: Educational-grade Python-only AST scanner (eval/exec/os.system). 2 stars, 11 commits, 0 forks. Strict subset of wired-in bandit. MIT.
